---
title: 'PlaySmart: The World''s Best Playgrounds'
date: '2018-02-22T06:13:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Playground, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5998516131279897847'
blogger_filename: '/2018/02/playsmart-worlds-best-playgrounds.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Playground, LLC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'PreLaunchResearch'
---

<br />
<h4>
<a href="http://www.playsmart.com/">PlaySmart: The World's Best Playgrounds</a></h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.playsmart.com/index.php/results/">Equipment List</a></li>
<li>They offer&nbsp;<a href="http://www.playsmart.com/index.php/get-started/financing/">in-house financing</a>.</li>
</ul>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<i>Each playground is composed of individual&nbsp;<a href="http://www.playsmart.com/index.php/products/events/">Events&nbsp;</a>that allow children to play interactively with each other, and children benefit from a healthy dose of exercise as well!&nbsp;</i></blockquote>
The following are images taken by ourselves as well as those from the PlaySmart website and a few from around Google Images. These are examples of PlaySmart equipment that we intend to use for The Playground, LLC of Idaho.<br />
<br />
These photos are not of our facility; rather, they are of the type of equipment we intend to use from the company that produces that equipment. They are intended to provide a inspiration for what The Playground, LLC of Idaho will look like.<br />
<br />
Be inspired along&nbsp;with us:<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bonkers-l-d6bb276476dc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="500" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bonkers-l-67400c2e21dd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/funquest-l-0fd9fc44bfad.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="500" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/funquest-l-6c4434a87cbd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/hyperspace-l-711310e83277.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="500" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/hyperspace-l-8d429067077b.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/interskate91-l-3bade2e6fe28.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="500" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/interskate91-l-1a6c15dc0e4f.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/kate-l-a001d729b064.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="500" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/kate-l-1d92c432c485.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030431-988fbb174e61.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030431-1ca439ad7810.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030433-bb20333e7e89.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030433-e07311af4155.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030436-dc5bb015715f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030436-5ab2e02da64e.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030437-copy-ede138a89062.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030437-copy-5d1394f7c7a9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030438-a8a240f67c0c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030438-804576ccf7fd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030439-2a277b801967.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030439-404b2723ecad.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030440-3125624468dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030440-f68f08946cf9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030442-d0759ffe5902.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030442-0a5c50572a15.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030443-5a4b8bbe7a40.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030443-3b293a4d9f0f.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030444-12b2f51035b5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030444-1e797b2c686a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030445-48dd269adc27.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030445-867b9a530c59.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030446-c0888a2d0409.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030446-d5946dbdd10c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030447-281-29-750aa92fe9dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030447-281-29-f08759813c58.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030448-6d88c80eb5c3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030448-a21d3b4db488.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030449-a36475498e5c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030449-96f566f4caf0.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030450-dd3118994171.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030450-0d3c3d929152.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030451-b13053763986.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030451-47070a9e3854.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030452-f39b49831b7c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030452-b4b09bdbb5b5.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030453-4a0db035847d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030453-0b9c6d9db7a5.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030455-f2b95eeefc87.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030455-a37db8c5a2a2.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030456-bbc573a46618.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030456-eec7984d615b.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030457-733f84d1562b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/p1030457-f8a95ffe54eb.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-slide-6c3547604184.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="375" data-original-width="563" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-slide-3ad4c5accd6a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-tunnel-1202b05eca52.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="494" data-original-width="625" height="252" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-tunnel-b4d43b20a1f5.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/playground-long-68b5fb10cfbe.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="217" data-original-width="982" height="141" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/playground-long-06ea4ce95590.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
